cards.title: HbA1c target with advanced technology (CGM/AID)
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD 2024建议，对于能够使用连续血糖监测（CGM）和自动胰岛素输注（AID）等先进技术的糖尿病患儿和青少年，HbA1c目标为≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。在安全可实现的情况下，应鼓励所有患儿争取该目标。
cards.claim_en: ISPAD 2024 recommends a target HbA1c of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol) for children and adolescents with diabetes who have access to advanced diabetes technologies like continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) and automated insulin delivery (AID). This target should be encouraged for all when safely achievable.

source.section: Summary of What Is New or Different, point 1

cards.title: HbA1c target without advanced technology
cards.claim_zh: 对于无法使用先进技术（CGM、AID）的糖尿病患儿和青少年，ISPAD 2024的HbA1c目标为≤7.0%（53 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: For children and adolescents with diabetes in settings without access to advanced diabetes technologies (CGM, AID), the ISPAD 2024 HbA1c target is ≤7.0% (53 mmol/mol).

source.section: Summary of What Is New or Different, point 1

cards.title: Lower HbA1c reduces complications without increasing hypoglycemia
cards.claim_zh: 越来越多的证据表明，将HbA1c降至既往目标以下可显著降低糖尿病并发症风险。在有足够技术和医疗专业人员支持的情况下，这些更低的血糖目标可以安全实现，而不会增加低血糖风险或增加护理负担。
cards.claim_en: Growing evidence shows that achieving HbA1c levels below previous targets can significantly reduce the risk of developing diabetes complications. When adequate technology and healthcare professional support are available, these lower glycemic targets can be safely achieved without increasing the risk of hypoglycemia or adding to care burdens.

source.section: Summary of What Is New or Different, point 1

cards.title: New ISPAD HbA1c target with advanced technology
cards.claim_zh: 对于能够使用先进糖尿病技术（如持续葡萄糖监测和自动胰岛素输注）的患儿，推荐新的糖化血红蛋白（HbA1c）目标为≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: A new target for hemoglobin A1c (HbA1c) of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol) is recommended for those who have access to advanced diabetes technologies like continuous glucose monitoring and automated insulin delivery.

cards.title: ISPAD HbA1c target for other care settings
cards.claim_zh: 在其他诊疗环境中，HbA1c目标为≤7.0%（53 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: In other settings, the HbA1c target is ≤7.0% (53 mmol/mol).

cards.title: ISPAD 2022 HbA1c target
cards.claim_zh: 2022年，ISPAD将HbA1c目标设定为7.0%（53 mmol/mol），并在可行时允许更低目标，特别是在能够使用AID等金标准治疗时。
cards.claim_en: In 2022, ISPAD set the HbA1c target at 7.0% (53 mmol/mol), with a provision for lower targets where feasible, particularly when there is access to gold standard treatments like AID.

cards.title: Sweden and NICE HbA1c target
cards.claim_zh: 瑞典和NICE已将其HbA1c目标降低至6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。
cards.claim_en: Sweden and NICE have lowered their targets to 6.5% (48 mmol/mol).

cards.title: HbA1c 6.5% achievable for pre-school children
cards.claim_zh: 2022年，ISPAD指出学龄前儿童可安全达到HbA1c 6.5%的目标。
cards.claim_en: In 2022, ISPAD communicated that an HbA1c of 6.5% could be safely achieved for pre-school children.

cards.title: ADA HbA1c recommendation
cards.claim_zh: ADA推荐HbA1c <6.5%作为合理目标（前提是没有低血糖风险、不影响健康或不造成过度负担），同时允许个体化目标，<7.0%为适当目标。
cards.claim_en: The ADA recommends an HbA1c of <6.5% as a reasonable goal if it can be achieved without significant risk of hypoglycemia, or negatively impacts on well-being or undue burden of care, but also allows flexibility with <7.0% as the appropriate target.

cards.title: Glycemic monitoring tools
cards.claim_zh: 医疗专业人员和糖尿病患者有多种血糖监测工具，包括使用血糖仪的自我血糖监测（SMBG）、持续葡萄糖监测（CGM）和HbA1c。HbA1c虽然是传统标准指标，但存在局限性，CGM可以弥补这些不足。
cards.claim_en: Healthcare professionals and persons with diabetes have various tools for monitoring glycemia, including self-monitored blood glucose (SMBG) using a glucose meter, CGM and HbA1c. While HbA1c has traditionally been the standard measure, it also has limitations that CGM can address.

cards.title: Pediatric CGM Level 2 Hypoglycemia Target
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD建议儿童患者2级低血糖时间（TBR Level 2）<1%，即低于3 mmol/L（<54 mg/dL）的时间应<1%。
cards.claim_en: ISPAD recommends Level 2 Time Below Range (TBR) should be <1% time spent below 3 mmol/L (<54 mg/dL) for pediatric patients.

cards.title: HbA1c Target ≤6.5% with Advanced Technologies
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD建议，在先进技术（CGM和AID）支持下能安全达到该目标，且追求更低目标不会增加负担影响生活质量的患者，HbA1c目标为≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol）。[C类证据]
cards.claim_en: ISPAD recommends an HbA1c target of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol) for those who can safely reach that target with the support of advanced technologies (CGM and AID) and/or where the pursuit of the lower target does not add burden such that quality of life is impacted. [Category C evidence]

cards.title: HbA1c Target ≤7% General
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD建议在所有其他情况下，儿童患者的HbA1c目标为≤7%（53 mmol/mol）。[A类证据]
cards.claim_en: ISPAD recommends an HbA1c target of ≤7% (53 mmol/mol) in all other scenarios for pediatric patients. [Category A evidence]

cards.title: HbA1c Measurement Frequency
cards.claim_zh: 定期检测HbA1c是临床护理的重要基础，公认的惯例为每3个月评估一次，因为HbA1c反映约90天的血糖水平。
cards.claim_en: Regular measuring of HbA1c is an important foundation of clinical care, with an accepted convention of 3 monthly assessments, given that HbA1c reflects approximately 90 days of glycemia.

cards.title: Lowest retinopathy rates at transition with HbA1c ≤6.5%
cards.claim_zh: 从儿科向成人服务过渡时，糖尿病视网膜病变发生率最低的情况出现在HbA1c≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol）时。
cards.claim_en: The lowest rates of diabetic retinopathy at the time of transition to adult services are seen where HbA1c is ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol).

cards.title: No clear albuminuria relationship at HbA1c 6.5% threshold
cards.claim_zh: 瑞典注册数据显示，在HbA1c 6.5%（48 mmol/mol）阈值下，未发现与白蛋白尿发生之间的明确关系。
cards.claim_en: Swedish registry data did not find a clear relationship for the development of increased albuminuria at the 6.5% (48 mmol/mol) HbA1c threshold.

cards.title: Higher albuminuria and retinopathy in Native Americans at prediabetes HbA1c
cards.claim_zh: 有2型糖尿病风险的美国原住民，HbA1c处于糖尿病前期范围（5.7–6.4% [39–47 mmol/mol]）时，白蛋白尿和视网膜病变的发生率高于HbA1c最佳水平的儿童。
cards.claim_en: Native Americans at risk of developing type 2 diabetes with HbA1c in a prediabetes range (5.7–6.4% [39–47 mmol/mol]) had higher incidence of albuminuria and retinopathy than children with optimal HbA1c levels.

cards.title: Limited evidence for kidney disease reduction below HbA1c 7% in T1D
cards.claim_zh: 在1型糖尿病中，HbA1c低于7%可减少糖尿病肾病发生和进展的证据有限。
cards.claim_en: There is limited evidence supporting reductions in diabetic kidney disease onset and progression at HbA1c levels below 7% in type 1 diabetes.

cards.title: HbA1c >7% associated with higher neuropathy risk in adolescents with T1D
cards.claim_zh: HbA1c >7%（53 mmol/mol）与病程超过5年的青少年1型糖尿病患者发生糖尿病神经病变的风险增高相关。
cards.claim_en: An HbA1c >7% (53 mmol/mol) was associated with a higher risk of developing diabetic neuropathy in adolescents with type 1 diabetes for >5 years.

cards.title: Neuropathy risk at HbA1c 6.5% threshold not assessed
cards.claim_zh: 6.5%（48 mmol/mol）较低阈值相关的神经病变风险尚未评估；需要更多数据或建模来确认使用6.5%目标对预防糖尿病神经病变的额外益处。
cards.claim_en: The neuropathy risk associated with a lower threshold of 6.5% (48 mmol/mol) was not assessed; further data or modeling are needed to confirm the additional benefit of using a 6.5% target for protecting against diabetic neuropathy.

cards.title: HbA1c 6.5% cognition target requires individual guidance
cards.claim_zh: 6.5%的较低目标应在个体化基础上谨慎指导，特别是在缺乏血糖监测和低血糖时暂停胰岛素的技术的环境中。
cards.claim_en: A lower target of 6.5% should be carefully guided on an individual basis, particularly in situations with limited access to glucose monitoring and technologies that suspend insulin when glucose is low.

cards.title: U-shaped curve between HbA1c and BMI with highest HbA1c in unhealthy weight groups
cards.claim_zh: 存在独立于HbA1c的BMI外部影响因素，表现为U型曲线——最高HbA1c出现在体重不健康的人群中。
cards.claim_en: There are external influences on BMI independent of HbA1c, as apparent with the U-shaped curve with the highest HbA1c observed in groups with unhealthy weight.

cards.title: International registries show improving HbA1c but increasing BMI-SDS
cards.claim_zh: 国际注册数据显示HbA1c总体改善，但BMI标准差评分（SDS）升高的人群比例也在增加。
cards.claim_en: International registries are demonstrating an overall improvement in HbA1c but also an increasing prevalence of higher BMI-standard deviation scores (SDS).

cards.title: CGM Time in Range (TIR) target for children and adolescents
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年应努力使血糖在3.9–10 mmol/L（70–180 mg/dL）范围内的时间>70% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents with diabetes should strive for >70% time between 3.9 and 10 mmol/L (70–180 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: CGM Time Below Range (TBR) level 1 target
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年血糖低于3.9 mmol/L（70 mg/dL）的时间应<4% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents should spend <4% of time below 3.9 mmol/L (70 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: CGM Time Below Range (TBR) level 2 target
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年血糖低于3.0 mmol/L（54 mg/dL）的时间应<1% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents should spend <1% of time below 3.0 mmol/L (54 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: CGM Time Above Range (TAR) level 1 target
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年血糖高于10 mmol/L（180 mg/dL）的时间应<25% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents should spend <25% of time above 10 mmol/L (180 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: CGM Time Above Range (TAR) level 2 target
cards.claim_zh: 糖尿病儿童和青少年血糖高于13.9 mmol/L（250 mg/dL）的时间应<5% [B]。
cards.claim_en: Children and adolescents should spend <5% of time above 13.9 mmol/L (250 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: TIR >80% needed for optimal HbA1c ≤6.5%
cards.claim_zh: 为达到最佳HbA1c目标≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol），血糖目标范围内时间（TIR）可能需要>80% [E]。
cards.claim_en: Time in range (TIR) may need to be >80% to achieve an optimal HbA1c target of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol) [E].

cards.title: TITR emerging metric for optimal glycemia
cards.claim_zh: 严格目标范围内时间（TITR）>50%（3.9–8 mmol/L 或 70–144 mg/dL）是评估平均血糖变化和血糖变异性的新兴指标 [C]。
cards.claim_en: Time in tight range (TITR) of >50% between 3.9–8 mmol/L (70–144 mg/dL) is an emerging metric for assessing changes in mean glucose and glucose variability [C].

cards.title: TITR >55% needed for HbA1c ≤6.5%
cards.claim_zh: 为达到较低的HbA1c目标≤6.5%（48 mmol/mol），TITR可能需要>55%。
cards.claim_en: To reach the lower HbA1c target of ≤6.5% (48 mmol/mol), a TITR of >55% may be needed.

cards.title: SMBG pre-prandial target
cards.claim_zh: 在无CGM的情况下，餐前自我血糖监测（SMBG）目标应为4.0–8.0 mmol/L（70–144 mg/dL）[B]。
cards.claim_en: In the absence of CGM, pre-prandial SMBG targets should be 4.0–8.0 mmol/L (70–144 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: SMBG post-prandial target
cards.claim_zh: 在无CGM的情况下，餐后自我血糖监测（SMBG）目标应为4.0–10 mmol/L（70–180 mg/dL）[B]。
cards.claim_en: In the absence of CGM, post-prandial SMBG targets should be 4.0–10 mmol/L (70–180 mg/dL) [B].

cards.title: SMBG minimum daily frequency with insulin
cards.claim_zh: 在无CGM的情况下，使用胰岛素的糖尿病患者每天应至少进行6次自我血糖监测（SMBG）[B]。
cards.claim_en: In the absence of CGM, SMBG should be undertaken at least 6 times a day in persons with diabetes taking insulin [B].

cards.title: SMBG meter values HbA1c correspondence target
cards.claim_zh: SMBG血糖仪数值应以对应HbA1c ≤7%（≤53 mmol/mol）为目标，与CGM TIR >70%（4–10 mmol/L，70–180 mg/dL）的目标一致。
cards.claim_en: SMBG meter values should be targeted to correspond to an HbA1c ≤7% (≤53 mmol/mol), to align with the CGM TIR target of >70% between 4 and 10 mmol/L (70–180 mg/dL).

cards.title: SMBG fasting target range
cards.claim_zh: 推荐空腹血糖目标范围为4.0–8 mmol/L（70–144 mg/dL），以达到HbA1c ≤7%的目标。
cards.claim_en: Fasting target range glucose of 4.0–8 mmol/L (70–144 mg/dL) is recommended to achieve an HbA1c ≤7% target.

cards.title: SMBG pre-bed target range
cards.claim_zh: 睡前SMBG血糖水平4.0–8 mmol/L（70–144 mg/dL）为适宜目标，但在某些情况下（如先前低血糖、运动或低血糖感知障碍），照护者可能更倾向于4.0–10 mmol/L（70–180 mg/dL）范围内的较高水平。
cards.claim_en: SMBG glucose levels prior to bed of 4.0–8 mmol/L (70–144 mg/dL) are appropriate, though caregivers may prefer higher levels within 4.0–10 mmol/L (70–180 mg/dL) in certain scenarios such as preceding hypoglycemia, exercise, or hypoglycemic unawareness.

cards.title: HbA1c target range: 6.5% vs 7.0%
cards.claim_zh: ISPAD当前推荐的HbA1c目标为6.5%（48 mmol/mol），此前目标为7.0%（53 mmol/mol）。需要进一步研究评估这两个目标之间在并发症风险和照护负担感知方面的差异。
cards.claim_en: The currently proposed ISPAD HbA1c target is 6.5% (48 mmol/mol), versus the former target of 7.0% (53 mmol/mol). Future research is needed to evaluate differences in risk of complications and perceived care burdens between these two targets.

cards.title: SMBG requires >6 daily tests to guide management
cards.claim_zh: 维持每天>6次自我血糖监测（SMBG）以指导管理，一直被认为是改善整体血糖状况的重大障碍。
cards.claim_en: Maintaining >6 self-tests per day with SMBG to guide management has long been recognized as a significant barrier to improving overall glycemia.

cards.title: Modern CGM accuracy is very high despite intermittent inaccuracy
cards.claim_zh: CGM可能间歇性不准确，并可能受多种药物影响；然而现代CGM技术的总体准确性非常高。
cards.claim_en: CGM can be intermittently inaccurate and may be impacted by various pharmaceutical agents; however, overall accuracy in modern CGM technology is very high.

cards.title: HbA1c limitation: wide glucose variance at same HbA1c
cards.claim_zh: 对于给定的HbA1c值，平均血糖浓度存在较大变异范围；对于给定的平均血糖值，HbA1c也存在较大变异范围。
cards.claim_en: For a given HbA1c value, there is a wide range of mean glucose concentration values, and for any given mean glucose value there is a wide range of HbA1c values.

cards.title: HbA1c unreliable in certain conditions
cards.claim_zh: HbA1c检测在某些疾病状态下不可靠，包括贫血、血红蛋白病和肝脏疾病。种族差异也会影响HbA1c水平。
cards.claim_en: HbA1c measurement is unreliable in certain conditions including anemia, hemoglobinopathies, and liver disease. Racial differences also affect HbA1c levels.

cards.title: ADA evidence grading system for recommendations
cards.claim_zh: 推荐意见按照ADA糖尿病医疗标准证据分级系统进行评级。该A-E分级系统中A级为最高证据水平，E级为最低。
cards.claim_en: Recommendations were graded as per the ADA evidence grading system for Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes. This hierarchical A-E grading system sets A as having the highest level of evidence, and E having the lowest.
